programs.title: German News
programs.desc: The news of the day from Germany and the World. With reports and interviews from politics, society and culture. Provided by Zweites Deutsches Fernsehen ZDF in Mainz, Germany. In German, no subtitles.

programs.title: Spanish News
programs.desc: News via satellite from RTVE Madrid Spain, in Spanish, no subtitles.

programs.title: Spanish News France 24
programs.desc: International news and current affairs from France24 studios in Bogota, offering a Latin American & French perspective on world events, in Spanish, no subtitles.

programs.title: Arabic News France 24
programs.desc: International news and current affairs from France 24 Arabic, via satellite, in Arabic, no subtitles.

programs.title: Dutch News
programs.desc: News via stream and file delivery from BVN-NOS Netherlands, in Dutch, no subtitles.

programs.title: Macedonian News
programs.desc: News via satellite from MRT in Skopje, North Macedonia, in Macedonian, no subtitles.
